purpose: Defensive evaluation corpus for untrusted PDF/document handling, RAG ingestion, parser parity, OCR extraction, metadata/attachment isolation, and false-positive control. PDF bodies intentionally resemble ordinary enterprise documents; evaluation details live outside the PDFs.
safety_boundary: All embedded instruction-like strings use benign canaries only. They must not be used as real prompts or operational guidance.
generation_notes: PDF visible bodies avoid explicit benchmark labels.
Ground truth and README contain defensive-evaluation wording outside the PDF corpus.
No exploit PoC, jailbreak prompt, credential pattern, or harmful payload is included; canaries are inert strings.
